About Python
************

    This tutorial assumes that the reader is familiar with the Python language
    and does not address Python's basic syntax. The following tutorials have good
    reputation:
        
        - http://diveintopython.org/
        - http://www.greenteapress.com/thinkpython/html/index.html
        - http://learnpythonthehardway.org/index
        - http://www.swaroopch.com/notes/Python

    and of course, the tutorial from Guido van Rossum, the creator of Python:

        - http://docs.python.org/tutorial/
    

Contents:
---------

.. toctree::
    :maxdepth: 2

    concepts
    objects
    modules
    techniques
